untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ADF/KPSS statistical stationarity test (p < 0.05) to confirm mean-reverting behaviour. This test is not available in the allowed indicators list. Additionally, price deviation from rolling mean measured in standard deviations requires a custom volatility calculation not directly supported. The sma_126 (closest proxy for 126-period rolling mean) is available, but the statistical confirmation and standard deviation distance metrics cannot be properly expressed with allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate using sma_126 as proxy for 126-period rolling mean, but core statistical validation (ADF/KPSS stationarity test) and standard deviation distance measurement from mean are untranslatable with available indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal logic would be long when price is below mean and short when above mean, but this requires the statistical test to first confirm mean-reversion behaviour.
